narrative:
Hamilton Twp M (precinct in Warren County) has 1,279 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
